legs.label: Validate contract
legs.description: AX verifies the contract resolves to one confirmed stub and one lexicon prefLabel.

legs.label: Draft or repair
legs.description: Raven drafts only the WHAT, WHERE, WHY, WHEN, and HOW body sections from cited source ranges.

legs.label: Validate candidate
legs.description: AX rejects missing sections and forbidden provenance/category frontmatter.

legs.label: Grade candidate
legs.description: Raven grades source support, confirmed-shelf fit, and lexicon-constrained naming before publish.

legs.label: Route grade
legs.description: AX validates the grade report and emits GRADE_PASS, GRADE_REVISE, or GRADE_BAIL.

legs.label: Consume revision budget
legs.description: AX routes repair attempts until the revision budget is exhausted.

legs.label: Publish card
legs.description: AX appends to the confirmed stub and appends atomic_card.created with the agent actor.

legs.label: Emit child result
legs.description: AX reports the contract projection back to the parent plan.
